series_metadata.series_description: Ohio medical professional underwriting association (JUA) liquidation trust files created in process to dissolve trust.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain on-site 3 years after 06/30/04; then re-evaluate retention schedule; review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Retain on-site 3 years after 06/30/04; then re-evaluate retention schedule; review by State Archives prior to disposal., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
